title: Garlicky Chinese Shrimp Bake
description: A garlicky and pillowy Chinese dish featuring jumbo shrimp, perfect for meal prep. This ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, olive oil, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the bowl and whisk until well combined.
Add the jumbo shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the garlic-ginger sauce.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the shrimp in a single layer.
Sprinkle the chopped scallions over the shrimp.
Bake the shrimp in the preheated oven for 12 minutes, or until pink and cooked through.
Remove the shrimp from the oven and serve hot.
Garnish with additional scallions if desired.
